title: ABIF Strategic Funding Analysis 2026
executiveSummary: As of Mar 11, 2026, the Indian funding ecosystem shows a robust activity level with 72 active programs identified. There is a significant tactical focus on Incubator / Scaling, which accounts for 42% of current open calls.

keyTrends.detail: Incubator / Scaling remains a primary driver of new capital calls in this current cycle.
42 premium programs are currently active in the high-impact (?50L - ?5Cr) tier.
Expansion noted in central government calls (BIRAC/DST) for deep-science R&D.

actionableRecommendations: Begin drafting concept notes for the upcoming summer Q2 funding cycles.
Review SMILE and SIDBI eligibility for high-value soft loan scaling.
